# Gold's Gym - Asset Manifest

## Project: OhMyGold Team 1 - Gold's Gym Resource Base
**Generated:** Auto-generated from 25 source assets
**Total Files:** 91 organized assets across 4 main categories
**Asset Categories:** 25 sourced from original files + 66 generated (favicons, app icons, splash screens, WebP variants, hero resizes)

- `golds-gym-logo-primary.png` - Default for all web/app uses
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-medium.png` - Header/navigation bars
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-small.png` - Inline text, badges, chips
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-large.png` - Hero sections, print materials
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-@2x.png` - Retina displays
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-@3x.png` - Super Retina (iPhone 14+)

## Asset Quality Notes

### High Quality (Excellent)
- `golds-gym-logo-primary.png` - Clean vector-quality PNG, transparent background, sharp edges
- `golds-gym-logo-primary-alt.png` - Same quality as primary
- All app icon variants - Generated from high-res source with proper anti-aliasing

### Good Quality (Production Ready)
- Facility photos (PNG sources) - Good resolution (~1600px wide), well-lit professional photography
- Team fitness group photo - Good composition, professional lighting
- App mockup - Clean product mockup

### Medium Quality (Usable with considerations)
- `golds-gym-logo-medium.png` - Low resolution (~128px), use only for small inline displays
- Favicon originals (`ia_100000000147.png`, `ia_100000000167.png`) - Very small originals, use generated versions instead
- `texture-diamond-plate-metal.jpg` - Heavy grain/noise, suitable as dark background texture
- `action-chest-press-workout.png` - Slightly compressed but acceptable

### Low Quality / Limitations
- Social media icons (`ia_100000000.png` - `002.png`) - Simple flat icons, sufficient for footer links
- `app-mockup-phones.png` - Lower resolution, German text in UI, may need replacement for production

---

## Gaps to Fill

### Critical Missing Assets

| Category | Missing Asset | Priority | Impact |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Logo** | Gold's Gym logo with white/yellow text for dark backgrounds (proper inverse) | HIGH | Dark mode support |
| **Logo** | SVG vector version of logo | HIGH | Infinite scalability |
| **Logo** | Logo with registered trademark symbol (R) properly rendered | MEDIUM | Legal compliance |
| **Icons** | Tab bar icons (Home, Classes, Schedule, Profile, Locations) | HIGH | App navigation |
| **Icons** | UI icons (calendar, clock, location, phone, email, checkmark, arrow) | HIGH | Interface elements |
| **Icons** | Fitness category icons (strength, cardio, boxing, yoga, HIIT) | MEDIUM | Class/program browsing |
| **Images** | Hero image with people (not just empty gym) | HIGH | Engagement/conversion |
| **Images** | Individual trainer/coach portraits | HIGH | "Meet the team" section |
| **Images** | Equipment close-up photos | MEDIUM | Equipment showcase |
| **Images** | Class/action photos (yoga, boxing, group fitness) | HIGH | Class descriptions |
| **Images** | Exterior/building photos | MEDIUM | Location finder |
| **Images** | Membership card design | LOW | Digital membership |
| **Splash** | Splash screen with tagline/branding beyond just logo | MEDIUM | Brand storytelling |
| **Branding** | Gold's Gym brand pattern or graphic element | MEDIUM | Visual identity depth |

---

## Generation Priorities

### Priority 1: Must-Have (Blockers)
1. **SVG logo vector** - Generate from source or recreate
2. **App tab bar icons** (5 icons: home, calendar, dumbbell, user, map-pin)
3. **UI icon set** (at minimum: arrow, check, x, menu, search, phone, email, location)
4. **Hero image with people** - Generate or source from branding shoot

### Priority 2: Should-Have (High Value)
5. **Proper inverse logo** with yellow text for dark mode
6. **Individual trainer portraits** (3-5 diverse coaches)
7. **Fitness class action photos** (boxing, yoga, group training)
8. **Equipment detail photos** (dumbbells, treadmills, squat rack)

### Priority 3: Nice-to-Have (Polish)
9. **Brand pattern/texture** (beyond diamond plate)
10. **Animated splash screen variant**
11. **Social media banner templates**
12. **Membership card template design**

---

## File Format Reference

| Format | Use Case | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **PNG** | Logos, icons, transparency | Lossless, supports alpha channel |
| **JPG** | Photos, hero images | Lossy compression, smaller file size |
| **WebP** | Web delivery (modern browsers) | 25-35% smaller than JPG, supports transparency |
| **SVG** | Vector logos, icons | Infinite scaling, smallest file size (source not available) |

### Format Selection Guide
- **Web:** Serve WebP to modern browsers, fallback to JPG/PNG
- **iOS:** Use PNG for icons/logo, JPG for photos
- **Android:** Use WebP for all (API 15+ supports WebP with transparency)
- **React Native:** Use @1x/@2x/@3x PNG naming convention
|

### Format Selection Guide
- **Web:** Serve WebP to modern browsers, fallback to JPG/PNG
- **iOS:** Use PNG for icons/logo, JPG for photos
- **Android:** Use WebP for all (API 15+ supports WebP with transparency)
- **React Native:** Use @1x/@2x/@3x PNG naming convention
